name: ml-expert
description: Implement machine learning solutions including model architectures, training pipelines, optimization strategies, and performance improvements. This skill spawns a specialist ML implementation agent...
capabilities: Implement neural network architectures from research papers and specifications
Build training pipelines with gradient handling, mixed precision, and checkpointing
Optimize model performance for inference speed, memory efficiency, and numerical stability
Write comprehensive unit tests with 90%+ coverage and integration tests
Apply PyTorch best practices including proper module registration and autograd handling
Integrate with ml-training-debugger for diagnosing and fixing training issues
author: DNYoussef
securitySummary: This is a legitimate ML implementation skill. All 79 static findings are false positives. The scanner misidentified Python code examples (backticks in string literals) as shell commands, and benign ML terminology as cryptographic/network threats. The skill operates in plan mode with user approval for all changes. No malicious patterns, credential theft, or exfiltration behavior detected.
valueStatement: Transform ML research into production code. Get expert implementation of neural architectures, training pipelines, and performance optimizations with comprehensive testing and validation.
limitations: Does not provide pretrained model weights or trained parameters
Cannot access external GPUs or cloud compute resources for actual training
Limited to generating and validating code; does not execute training loops itself
Requires reference papers or clear specifications for custom architecture implementation

useCases.title: Implement Research Papers
useCases.description: Transform academic papers into working PyTorch implementations with proper testing and documentation

useCases.title: Optimize Training Code
useCases.description: Fix training issues and optimize model performance for faster inference and lower memory usage

useCases.title: Build ML Pipelines
useCases.description: Create production-ready training pipelines with checkpointing, validation, and monitoring

promptTemplates.title: Basic Implementation
promptTemplates.prompt: Implement a [architecture name] model in PyTorch with [n] layers and [d] hidden dimensions. Include proper initialization and docstrings.

promptTemplates.title: Paper Implementation
promptTemplates.prompt: Implement the [paper name] architecture from this paper specification. Target parameter count: [X]M. Framework: PyTorch. Include tests.

promptTemplates.title: Training Pipeline
promptTemplates.prompt: Build a complete training pipeline for my model. Include: mixed precision training, gradient checkpointing, learning rate scheduling, checkpoint saving, and validation loop.

promptTemplates.title: Performance Tuning
promptTemplates.prompt: Optimize my model for real-time inference. Current latency is [X]ms. Target: [Y]ms. Apply torch.compile, operator fusion, and memory optimizations.

bestPractices: Provide reference papers or clear specifications when requesting custom architectures
Specify constraints upfront including parameter budget, memory limits, and speed requirements
Request tests and documentation in the same prompt for complete, verifiable deliverables
antiPatterns: Asking for implementation without reviewing the plan first breaks plan mode safety guarantees
Requesting changes to production code without updating corresponding unit tests
Skipping validation by not running the provided test suite before deployment

faq.question: What ML frameworks are supported?
faq.answer: Primary support for PyTorch. Custom implementations work with standard tensor operations and can adapt to other frameworks.

faq.question: What performance targets can I request?
faq.answer: Specify parameter counts, memory limits (VRAM), and latency requirements. Agent optimizes within constraints.

faq.question: How does this integrate with other skills?
faq.answer: Works with ml-training-debugger for issue fixes and code-analyzer for quality review.

faq.question: Is my data safe?
faq.answer: The skill only accesses your project files. No external data transmission occurs during implementation.

faq.question: Why does it ask before making changes?
faq.answer: Plan mode ensures transparency. You review and approve all code changes before they are applied.

faq.question: How is this different from Codex?
faq.answer: Provides specialized ML expertise with structured methodology, testing standards, and optimization knowledge.
